privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
privacy.s1Body: The data controller is PAPI Hair Design, Trieda SNP 61, Košice. Contact: papihairdesign@gmail.com.
privacy.s2Body: First name, last name, email, phone number (optional), booking history. Technical data: IP address, browser type, session cookies.
privacy.s3Body: Booking management (contract performance, Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). Marketing communication only with consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). Legal obligations.
privacy.s4Body: We use functional cookies (login, language setting) and a marketing consent audit table. No analytics or advertising cookies without your consent.
privacy.s5Body: Google Firebase (cloud database and authentication). Vercel Inc. (hosting). No other third parties without your consent.
privacy.s6Body: Bookings: 3 years from last activity. Marketing consent: until withdrawal. Logs: 90 days.
privacy.s7Body: Access to data: GET /gdpr/status · Export: GET /gdpr/export · Deletion: DELETE /gdpr/delete. Withdraw consent at any time. Complaint: Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic.
privacy.s8Body: We will inform you of any changes by email or in-app notification.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: PAPI Hair Design · booking.papihairdesign.sk
terms.s1Body: By using the PAPI Hair Design online booking system, you agree to these terms. The system is operated by PAPI Hair Design, Trieda SNP 61, Košice.
terms.s2Body: An online booking is binding upon confirmation by email. The salon reserves the right to decline a booking for capacity reasons or breach of terms.
terms.s3Body: You may cancel or change a booking at least 24 hours before the appointment. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee.
terms.s4Body: Processing of personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy available on this website.
terms.s5Body: PAPI Hair Design is not liable for damages resulting from system outages, force majeure, or losses caused by improper use of the application.
terms.s6Body: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. The current version is always available on this page.

salonLogin.quote: Behind every perfect cut is a hand that does it with heart.
